name: Simple Inbound and Outbound Exclusions
description: Scenario where clients 1 and 2 inbound exclude clients 4 and 5, while client 3 outbound excludes client 5. This tests track consolidation for clients with identical exclusion patterns and reusing the global track for outbound-only clients.

expected_tracks.track_c1_c2_no4_no5: For clients 1 and 2, excluding clients 4 and 5
expected_tracks.global: For clients 0, 3, and 4 (including client 3 with outbound-only exclusion)
